tagline: Third-party client for Yanshan University academic affairs system

hero.title: YSU Terminal
hero.subtitle: Third-party Android client for Yanshan University academic affairs system

grades.title: Grades
grades.desc: Filter by semester, view statistics, distribution, auto-calculate current term GPA

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.desc: Merge theory and lab courses, switch by week, check-in/out supported

gpa.title: GPA
gpa.desc: Credits and GPA at a glance

training.title: Training Plan
training.desc: View course completion and academic warnings

evaluation.title: Evaluation
evaluation.desc: Batch auto-fill highest score for student evaluations

footer.disclaimer: This is a third-party client, not affiliated with Yanshan University.

privacy.title: Privacy & Disclaimer
privacy.noticeShort: This is a third-party client for the Yanshan University academic affairs system, not affiliated with the university. All data is processed locally without third-party servers.

dataSource.title: Data Source & Security
dataSource.content: All business logic is implemented locally. Data is fetched from the official academic affairs system and stored locally. No third-party servers are involved. Credentials are encrypted and stored using the device's secure storage (Android Keystore / iOS Keychain).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This project is a third-party client, not affiliated with Yanshan University. It is for personal learning and communication purposes only. The code is entirely written by AI, with only basic design debugging and rough auditing done manually. By using this app, you acknowledge and accept the associated risks. Do not use it for infringing on others' rights or violating school regulations.

compatibility.title: WebView Compatibility
compatibility.intro: This app relies on Android System WebView to render the interface. Different WebView versions vary in feature support and rendering behavior:

versions.label: Below WebView v111
versions.desc: Minimum supported version. Versions below this may cause severe style distortion or even complete failure to render styles.

versions.label: WebView v111 ~ v118
versions.desc: Usable, but transparent effects in the title bar and some card border styles may not render correctly. Does not affect normal usage.

versions.label: WebView v119+
versions.desc: All styles in this app can be rendered correctly.

versions.label: WebView v140+
versions.desc: Supports immersive status bar and gesture navigation bar (小白条).

compatibility.recommendation: It is recommended to update WebView to the latest version. Newer versions not only add more features and fix bugs, but often also bring performance improvements.

webviewUpdate.title: How to Update Android System WebView
webviewUpdate.intro: Android System WebView is a system component responsible for rendering web content within apps. Keeping WebView updated ensures the app receives the latest security patches, performance improvements, and web feature support.

play.title: Update via Google Play Store
play.desc: If you can access the Google Play Store, update from there:

manual.title: Manual Update or Manufacturer Store
manual.desc: If you cannot access the Play Store, try manually finding and installing a newer version of WebView, or check your manufacturer's app store for WebView updates.

huawei.title: Special Note for Huawei/Honor Devices
huawei.desc: Due to manufacturer limitations, some Huawei/Honor models have their system WebView locked to Huawei WebView, whose Chromium version is outdated (latest is only v114, and even v99 has been encountered). This cannot be resolved. It is recommended to update to the latest v114 version provided by the manufacturer to maximize the experience.
